title: Count Integers With Even Digit Sum
titleCn: 统计各位数字之和为偶数的整数个数

testcases.input: num = 4 Output: 2 Explanation: The only integers less than or equal to 4 whose digit sums are even are 2 and 4.
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: The only integers less than or equal to 4 whose digit sums are even are 2 and 4.

testcases.input: num = 30 Output: 14 Explanation: The 14 integers less than or equal to 30 whose digit sums are even are 2, 4, 6, 8, 11, 13, 15, 17, 19, 20, 22, 24, 26, and 28.
testcases.expectedOutput: 14 Explanation: The 14 integers less than or equal to 30 whose digit sums are even are 2, 4, 6, 8, 11, 13, 15, 17, 19, 20, 22, 24, 26, and 28.
